text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O and I are on our way back to the
academy when...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Oh? And who might you be?

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
choice_data_list: (A child in pajamas? Alone out here?)

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text: I-I really wanted to meet you, Opera O, but... but... Sniffle... sob...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ah-ha, no need for tears. While they do glisten
like beautiful pearls, a smile suits you so much
better.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hmm... She appears to be lost.

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text: H-hic... O-Op... Um, Opera O... Sniffle!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We'll need to calm her down first before we can
help her.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I am honored to meet you, Princess! Should you
have no prior engagement...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Might I, the Overlord, be of service to you as
your escort?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O holds out her hand, and the girl
stops crying as she timidly takes it. We should
take her to the police station first.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Opera O agrees, but just as we turn to go...

text_block_list.name: Nurse
text_block_list.text: Ah, there you are! I'm so sorry for the trouble!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh... You are a nurse, I take it? Do you know this
little one?

text_block_list.name: Nurse
text_block_list.text:
Y-yes... She's a patient at the—wait... Aren't you
T.M. Opera O?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh? I see you know me. Well, of course you
would have knowledge of my name!

text_block_list.name: Nurse
text_block_list.text:
That girl is a fan of yours... and it seems she snuck
off after finding out Tracen Academy was nearby.

text_block_list.name: Nurse
text_block_list.text:
You can't do that, understand? We were all so
worried about you.

text_block_list.name: Girl in Pajamas
text_block_list.text: I... I-I... um... S-sorry... Hic!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I ask that you please excuse her just this once! My
captivating beauty is to blame.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: As an apology, I offer you a collectible photograph of myself—no! Ten copies of my film, 24 Hours with You: An Opera Anthology for you and every person at the hospital as well!

text_block_list.name: Nurse
text_block_list.text:
Oh, um... That's very nice of you, but, well...
Anyways, thank you for looking after her!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Sneaking out of a hospital all just to meet me.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: How corruptible it is, this beauty of mine!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Yes, from the joy of meeting me, and from
reflecting on the hardship of her solitary journey.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Cars and signage abound in this place. Many a
thing must appear a giant monstrosity to a child
of her age.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But she overcame her fears all for the sake of
seeing me with her own eyes.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Relief, joy, and a sense of accomplishment surely
enveloped her upon arrival... That is to say, those
tears were proof of her courage.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ahh! Such an admirable soul! I must open my
heart to such purity!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Opera O comprehends the entire well of emotion
behind the girl's tears.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
However! Sneaking away from a hospital is an act
far too dangerous!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I must offer a gift that will both ease her heart
and curb those impulses.
choice_data_list: How about you inspire her with your efforts?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: ...Indeed, that would be best.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: We must begin training right away, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I will create a short, two-hour piece which can be
performed within visitation hours. With me in the
starring role, it shall be an excellent opera!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I manage to convince her that, instead of an
opera, her brilliance on the racetrack would be a
better gift.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: An excellent idea!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Then what are we waiting for? There are
preparations to be made, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
For the photographs, of course! Her album of me
will not fill itself!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Me during twilight, me under starlight... Ah yes,
and me at dawn!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, T.M. Opera O adamantly insists that I
help with taking her photos.
